title: Yu Fei
content:
Yu Fei
 is a member of the 
Slaughter Realm
 under the 
Cultivation Alliance
 of the 
Alliance Star System
. He is part of a duo known as the "Soul Killer Duo."

Contents

1

Appearance

2

Personality

3

Background

4

History

5

Links and References

Appearance
[
]

He has a gloomy face and wears deep blood-red robes for clothes.

Personality
[
]

He has a twisted, cruel and bloodthirsty personality developed due to the tens of thousands of murders he has committed. He is also supremely arrogant as he is a member of the Slaughter Realm under the Cultivation Alliance.

Background
[
]

In the past, he committed tens of thousands of murders along with another person and together the two earned the moniker of "Soul Killer Duo."

History
[
]

He was sent to kill Xu Mu (Wang Lin) after he left 
Planet Suzaku
. In the beginning, he held the advantage against Wang Lin and his entourage (
Big-Head
, 
Ta Shan
, 
Lei Ji
) due to his superior cultivation and seven early-stage 
Nirvana Scryer
 avatars. However, Wang Lin fused with his original Ancient God body soon after and severely injured Yu Fei. Yu Fei even managed to escape to the Slaughter Realm but Wang Lin killed him inside the Slaughter Realm through the portal Yu Fei escaped through.
